_comment: Synthetic company filings (tier A) for CI.

filings.title: Material event: Arizona pilot plant capacity expansion
filings.body: Board approved USD 120 million capex for Arizona pilot plant capacity expansion for iron-air multi-day storage modules.

filings.title: Strategic investment in oxygen electrode manufacturing line
